author_rating_explanation: Focus authors Elena Sofia Ruzzetti and Martin Gubri are affiliated with University of Oxford, a top European AI school, plus NAVER AI Lab and KAIST AI, which are recognized Asian AI labs. The presence of Oxford places them in the 6-8 band, with the additional reputable labs supporting a score near the top of that range.
